description: LoongFlow is an expert-grade Agent framework for Loop Engineering. Through a Plan-Execute-Summary loop and structured experiential memory, it enables AI to continuously think, execute, reflect, and evolve across complex software engineering, mathematical, and machine learning tasks.
TUI / CLI config manager for agentic harnesses (Amp, Claude Code, Opencode, Goose, Copilot CLI, Crush, Droid)
MagicSkills：Stop copying skills between agents. MagicSkills turns scattered SKILL.md folders into reusable, composable, tool-ready capabilities.
A multi-agent AI trading system using LLMs to optimize strategies and adapt to market conditions in real-time.
An open-source high performance execution engine for agentic workflows
Unified local observability for AI coding assistants
A minimalist CLI for tracking tasks across AI coding sessions.
Free starter kit: Claude Code + Obsidian. Pre-configured vault with skills for projects, tasks, clients, and daily routines. Just open and go.
An extensible Model Context Protocol (MCP-Local-MRL-RAG-AST) server that provides intelligent semantic code search for AI assistants. Built with local AI models, inspired by Cursor's semantic search.
Terminal-first AI assistant for software engineering tasks (inspired by Claude Code v2.0.67)
specs.md - ai-dlc spec driven development framework
A plugin and extension cafe for OpenCode.
🏄‍♂️ Next.js 16 web UI for OpenCode - real-time chat with streaming, SSE sync, and React Server Components
"Hey, Computer" from Star Trek. Talk to your agent. Run hooks after trigger comands. Runs locally, cause shit's scary.
Community-driven workflows for Antigravity AI. Like Claude Skills - reusable prompts and automation for AI coding assistants.
AI semantic search for Zotero, with a built-in MCP server for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex). Find papers by meaning. 100% local and private.
Autohand Code CLI - Ultra fast self evolving coding agent that runs in your terminal
Fast way to switch between Claude Code configuration profiles

Comprehensive AI prompt engineering skills for Claude Code, ChatGPT GPTs, and Gemini Gems. Model-specific patterns for Claude Fable 5 / Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5 outcome-first / GPT-5.4 legacy XML, Gemini 3.1, Veo 3.1, Nano Banana 2, and gpt-image-2.
A Cli, a webUI, and a MCP server for the Z-Image-Turbo text-to-image generation model (Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo base model as well as quantized models)
Reticle intercepts, visualizes, and profiles JSON-RPC traffic between your LLM and MCP servers in real-time, with zero latency overhead. Stop debugging blind. Start seeing everything.
